case_title: ROBERT HOM VS. YE FANG ZHENG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOM, ROBERT SERVED MAR-13-2014, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOM, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHENG, YE FANG ZHENG, AMY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 239 2ND AVENUE, #3 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94118 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
